title: Chronos Client
description: Your go-to performance booster for Minecraft.
body: ## **Chronos Client:** your go-to performance booster [](https://quiltmc.org) ![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/qBOrMQj2?color=1CD76B&label=Downloads) ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/976198390520094791?color=5865F2&label=Discord&logo=Discord) Chronos Client is a Quilt client-side modpack boosting your performance and making your gameplay experience much better. Chronos is playing Minecraft on the next level. Experiencing Issues? Join the [Chronos Discord](https://discord.gg/7qK348UTzf) to get help! --- Features: 1. Ultimate performance 🔥 2. Fast loading times 🚀 3. Stability, reliability. No crashes! ⚖️ 4. Frequent updates 🕑 5. Expandable 🧩
